resource_reload_guard.screen.debug.title: Reload client resources?
resource_reload_guard.screen.debug.messa: In large modded environments this may take a long time
or may fail to complete normally.
It cannot be safely interrupted after it starts.
resource_reload_guard.screen.pack.title: Apply resource pack changes?
resource_reload_guard.screen.narration: Choose an action. The immediate action is briefly disabled for safety.
resource_reload_guard.screen.config_hint: This screen is provided by Resource Reload Guard. Its behavior can be changed in config/resource_reload_guard.toml.
resource_reload_guard.toast.title: Resource Reload Guard
resource_reload_guard.message.reload_in_: A resource reload is already in progress.
resource_reload_guard.message.deferred: The change will apply on the next launch.
resource_reload_guard.message.blocked: This reload is blocked by the current policy.
resource_reload_guard.warning.large_envi: Many mods are loaded; reload cost may be higher.
